personalInfo.name: Samay Rathod
personalInfo.title: SWE @Edmo | Hackathon Winner | Ex: Backend Intern @SarvM.AI | Full-Stack Developer | Researcher in AI & ML | Open to Opportunities
personalInfo.summary: Computer Science graduate from Chandigarh University currently working as a Junior Software Engineer at EDMO, with prior internship experience as an SDE Intern at iSchoolConnect and a Backend Intern at SarvM.AI. Specializes in building scalable backend systems, designing AI-powered chatbots, and creating responsive full-stack web applications. Strong foundation in Node.js, Spring Boot, and modern frameworks like Next.js, driven by a passion for solving real-world problems through innovative technology. Thrives in fast-paced, collaborative environments and enjoys tackling challenging projects that push technical and creative boundaries. Open to full-time opportunities.

certifications: Deploy a Web Application in Azure Kubernetes Service

projects.title: Wealth One
projects.description: A unified platform to analyze all investment funds with AI.

projects.title: Urban Snitch
projects.description: A full-stack web platform focused on customer safety, featuring secure password hashing and a seamless payment gateway for transactions.

projects.title: Load Balancer with Kubernetes & Docker
projects.description: A project demonstrating containerized load balancing using Kubernetes and Docker, enabling automatic scaling and high availability across multiple server instances.

highlights: Collaborated with a team of four interns to develop an AI-powered interviewing application for iSchoolConnect's hackathon, winning 1st place with a $50K prize; utilized Next.js, Nest.js, MongoDB, OpenAI GPT-4o-mini, and Vapi to implement flexible scheduling, smart question generation from resumes/custom inputs, parsing for insights, user dashboards, and instant feedback emails, streamlining hiring with AI automation and enhanced user experience.

Developed an automated GPA Calculation System for Rowan University that fetches and processes transcripts via OCR and Human-in-the-Loop validation. Configured admin dashboards to compute accurate GPAs, reducing manual processing time by 80% and successfully handling 1000+ transcripts per admission cycle in production.

Engineered National University's automated Transfer Credit Evaluation (TCE) pipeline utilizing OCR and AI models to map prior course credits with confidence scoring. Integrated a generic HIL workflow to validate confidence scores, accelerating the evaluation process by 3x and ensuring 99% data integrity for final admission reports.

Built an AI-driven Interview Analyzer with smart scheduling and question generation. Engineered a fault-tolerant upload service using Apache Kafka to orchestrate the storage of large video files in Google Cloud Storage, decoupling the user interface from backend processing to ensure seamless performance.

Developed an AI chatbot named Violet for NYU scholars using the ChatGPT-4.0 model, with a custom knowledge base built via data extraction using Beautiful Soup. Designed contextual welcome flows and implemented session and room logic to manage message history and improve user interaction.
Improved SEO performance by optimizing frontend performance metrics, reducing Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) from an average of 7.5s to 2.44s, leading to faster load times and better user experience.
Designed and implemented a cron scheduler to dynamically update retailer shop ratings by calculating the average from master rating, ensuring real-time accuracy and automation in the rating system.
Developed and optimized a scalable API for updating user subscription details in Elasticsearch, enhancing data consistency, search efficiency, and system performance.
Created a script to clean and validate shop data in the database by verifying QR scanner entries and filtering based on valid phone numbers and other criteria.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering (B.E.) in Computer Science

achievements.name: Research paper on frostbite detection using machine learning techniques
